initiatives.name: San Jose Community Fridge
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in San Jose. They coordinate community fridges, food distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty.

initiatives.name: San Jose Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support in San Jose. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective care.

initiatives.name: San Jose Peace & Justice Center
initiatives.description: A resource center and community space supporting peace and justice movements in the South Bay area through mutual aid and solidarity networks. They provide freely available community space, printing resources, audio equipment, and organizing support while building power through grassroots activism and collective action.

initiatives.name: San Jose Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and solidarity through free food distribution and anti-hunger organizing. They coordinate food recovery, community meals, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action against food waste and food insecurity in the South Bay area.

initiatives.name: Youth Space
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support for LGBTQ+ youth in San Jose. They coordinate direct assistance, mental health resources, and solidarity networks while building power through peer support, youth leadership development, and creating safe spaces for queer and trans young people to thrive.

initiatives.name: Community Got Us
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective dedicated to building community in San Jose, CA

initiatives.name: Hero Tent
initiatives.description: We are a passionate abolitionist mutual aid organization dedicated to reimagining community safety and pushing radical systemic change on the local level.

initiatives.name: San Jose Strong
initiatives.description: Volunteer-ran org connecting South Bay folks to resources & creating in-house initiatives that build community
